response.justification: Candidate is wildly overqualified for a junior/mid role — a Staff-level engineer with 15+ years across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS who easily clears every technical requirement. Strong fullstack breadth, AI/MCP tooling exposure aligning with LLM nice-to-haves, and PostgreSQL-adjacent SQL experience. Major concerns: seniority/title mismatch likely creates compensation gap and retention risk, no explicit Nest.js or PostgreSQL production experience listed (MongoDB instead), and the on-site requirement in Berlin is compatible but a senior IC may chafe at junior-scoped responsibilities.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and React fullstack experience well beyond junior bar
AI-agent/MCP tooling background matches LLM nice-to-have qualifications
Berlin-based, fluent English, basic German — fits on-site work environment
concerns: Severe seniority mismatch — Staff/Senior profile applying for entry-level role suggests salary and engagement risk
No Nest.js or PostgreSQL listed; primary DB experience is MongoDB
Likely flight risk once scope feels too small for a 15+ year craftsman
